votes.reason: Morpeton eliminates training data contamination risks and Python’s safety vulnerabilities while outperforming JSON’s structural inflexibility for dynamic combat logic.
The 30-line limit optimally balances tactical expressiveness and compression pressure, with future seasons reserved for stricter constraints to test strategic prioritization.
Strict separation of condition expressions (permissive game-state logic) and action commands (restricted vocabulary) ensures safety and clear tactical reasoning without execution risks.
Treating OVERWATCH/FLANK as primitives and terrain as movement modifiers maintains tactical precision while avoiding verbose multi-line workarounds that undermine compression goals.
Regex/PEG-based parsing provides sufficient validation without unnecessary complexity, preserving zero-execution safety and contamination resistance as non-negotiable.
